# Rebecca 0.1.3

This release focuses on admin traffic-limit correctness, subscription/import fixes, and faster release builds.

## What's new

- Improved admin per-service traffic controls
- Created-traffic service limits are now enforced when admins create or edit users
- My Account now shows service-level balances for standard admins using per-service limits
- Service traffic summaries now display created traffic against the configured limit
- Large user traffic reductions now correctly adjust created-traffic counters when allowed

- Improved user management UX
- Added compact delete confirmations near delete buttons across the panel
- Kept the data-limit stepper inside the input field without changing the GB suffix size
- Added quick add-traffic actions for users
- Reduced duplicate create-user warnings to a single notification

- Improved 3X-UI import compatibility
- Allowed imported usernames with hyphens
- Added search support for imported 3X-UI subscription addresses
- Fixed imported subscription link generation and configured subscription port precedence

- Improved persistence and runtime stability
- Persisted generated subscription templates across restarts
- Reduced SQLite usage-lock failures during high-frequency usage recording
- Fixed subscription links for users without Rebecca subscription credentials after import

- Faster release builds
- Default release builds now publish the fast binary set: Linux amd64 and Windows amd64
- Full Linux architecture builds remain available through manual workflow dispatch with `full_matrix`
- Release, Docker, and binary build jobs now stop after 10 minutes instead of running for hours

## Version

- Updated application version to `0.1.3`
